message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ParticipantFontColor black
  ParticipantPadding 20
  BoxBorderColor #888888
  BoxBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9CC
  NoteBorderColor #888888
  NoteFontColor black
  ArrowColor black
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "finest level" as Finest
participant "intermediate level(s)" as Inter
participant "base level" as Base

note over Finest: U(k,2) -> F(U(k,2))
Finest -> Finest : SDC
note over Finest: U(k',2) -> F(U(k',2))
Finest -> Inter : restrict

note over Inter: U(k,1) -> F(U(k,1))
Inter -> Inter : FAS
note over Inter: tau = Q(1)*F(U(k,1)) - R*Q(2)*F(U(k',2))
Inter -> Inter : SDC with FAS
note over Inter: U(k',1) -> F(U(k',1))
Inter -> Base : restrict

note over Base: U(k,0) -> F(U(k,0))
Base -> Base : FAS
note over Base: tau = Q(0)*F(U(k,0)) - R*Q(1)*F(U(k',1))
Base -> Base : SDC with FAS
note over Base: U(k+,0) -> F(U(k+,0))
Base -> Base : coarse correction
note over Base: c(0) = U(k+,0) - R*U(k',1)

Base -> Inter : prolongate
Inter -> Inter : correct
note over Inter: U(k'',1) = U(k',1) + P*c(0)
Inter -> Inter : SDC
note over Inter: U(k+,1) -> F(U(k+,1))
Inter -> Inter : coarse correction
note over Inter: c(1) = U(k+,1) - R*U(k',2)

Inter -> Finest : prolongate
Finest -> Finest : correct
note over Finest: U(k'',2) = U(k',2) + P*c(1)
Finest -> Finest : SDC
note over Finest: U(k+,2) -> F(U(k+,2))

@enduml
